0.text: Fibroatelectatic changes in the middle lobe of the right lung

1.text: Bronchial thickening in both lungs, more evident centrally

2.text: Focal ground-glass opacities in the right upper lobe anterior segment

3.text: Focal ground-glass opacities in the right lower lobe mediobasal segment

4.text: Focal ground-glass opacities in the right lower lobe laterobasal segment

5.text: Focal ground-glass opacities in the left lower lobe basal segment

6.text: Focal ground-glass opacities in the left lower lobe anterobasal segment

7.text: Subsegmental atelectatic changes in the right lower lobe laterobasal segment
